description: Builds a bowtie / critical-control diagram (CCPS/EI; ICMM Critical Control Management): top event, threats and preventive barriers, consequences and mitigative barriers — each barrier effective, independent, and auditable with a stated performance standard. Assistive: the team supplies the barrier judgements; the skill structures and records them, never declaring a barrier effective without the team's performance-standard evidence, recording [GAP] instead. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: bowtie-builder
